$comment: AAG Self-Hosting Completion — AAG framework が articulate rigor (= 意味 / 境界 / 依存関係) を要求する framework であるにも関わらず、entry navigation level でその rigor を満たしていない self-contradiction を解消する structural reorganization。R0 (境界定義先行 / READMEs + CURRENT_PROJECT.md + CLAUDE.md update) → R1 (AAG sub-tree relocation / aag/_internal/ + _framework/ skeleton) → R2 (AAG public interface relocate / references/05-aag-interface/) → R3 (references/ directory rename + *.generated.md 命名規約) → R4 (per-element directory + dashboard + element-taxonomy) → R5 (operational-protocol-system M1-M5 / references/05-aag-interface/protocols/) → R6 (AAG self-hosting closure articulate + projects/ split + template migrate) → R7 (統合 guard + verify + archive)。1,000+ inbound update + 138 guard / collector path 変更 + 14 新 guard (Hard / ratchet-down baseline=0 / pre-commit hook) を伴う、AAG Pilot の 5-10 倍 scope。詳細: projects/completed/aag-self-hosting-completion/projectization.md / plan.md。
